summary: Frontend testing of CALMA nutrition calculator completed successfully. All 10 requested features verified working: login, navigation to Nutrition, saved diet viewing with correct macros efectivos, date navigation, food search modal, adding food, quantity modification, food deletion, diet saving, and data persistence after reload.

ui_bugs.issue: Minor console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'
ui_bugs.impact: Accessibility warning only, functionality works correctly

issues: H progress bar shows red when over target (78/75g) - working correctly as intended

passed_tests: ✅ Navigation to Nutrición section via sidebar
✅ View saved diet with correct macros efectivos (Pechuga pollo: 42P, Arroz basmati: 78H)
✅ Category filter chips (Todas, Carnes, Pescados, Huevos, Lácteos, Proteína)
✅ Add food to meal from search results
✅ Delete food buttons visible and functional
✅ Save diet button with success toast 'Dieta guardada para jue, 12 mar'
✅ Macros persist correctly after page reload
✅ Day type toggle (Entreno ↔ Descanso) with correct macro redistribution
✅ Progress bars showing P/H/G status per meal
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent accessibility warning should be addressed by adding aria-describedby or Description component
Initial meal expansion state (C1: true) works correctly on first load
seed_data_creation: Test data exists on March 12, 2026 with Pechuga pollo (200g) and Arroz basmati (100g)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CALMA nutrition calculator features working correctly. The bug reported (macros showing as zero) is FIXED - macros efectivos display correctly: Pechuga pollo shows 42P|0H|0G, Arroz basmati shows 0P|78H|0G. The ?? operator fix in NutritionPage.jsx is working properly.
rca_of_the_issue: Original bug (macros showing zero) was caused by using || operator which treats 0 as falsy. Fix applied using ?? (nullish coalescing) operator which only treats null/undefined as falsy, preserving valid 0 values for H and G macros.
